text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here! This year's spring Tenno Sho will
begin shortly here at the verdant grounds of
Kyoto Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racer to look out for is, of course, Mejiro
Bright, who has been making her formidable
presence felt on the track!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But will she be able to seize a consecutive win
despite the fact that she'll have to run against her
peer, Mejiro Dober?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Yeah, I'm fine... It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, it's not nothing... Something's been on
her mind since the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I know the race is about to start, but don't
worry, I'll get my head back on straight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (She only has eyes for the race!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That just gave me chills... She's so determined...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(She's putting everything on the line for this
race!)
